Synthetic in-bounds frame. Expected from upstream reference (temperature 0xFFDE=-34 ->-3.4 C two's complement; humidity 80/2=40 %; occupancy byte 0 -> vacant/detected false).

Synthetic in-bounds frame. Expected from upstream reference (0x83/0x67: temperature 0x019A=410 ->41.0 C; abnormal flag byte 1 -> abnormal). Upstream key temperature_abnormal normalized to camelCase extra temperatureAbnormal.

Synthetic. Upstream returns a bare {} for an empty buffer; the output contract forbids a bare {}, so this codec reports an error instead.
Synthetic. Upstream breaks the TLV walk on an unknown channel and returns {}; this codec reports an error when no channel is recognized.
